recommendations.title: Star Trek II: The Wrath of Khan
recommendations.overview: The starship Enterprise and its crew is pulled back into action when old nemesis, Khan, steals a top secret device called Project Genesis.

recommendations.title: Beastie Boys Story
recommendations.overview: Here's a little story they're about to tell... Mike Diamond and Adam Horovitz share the story of their band and 40 years of friendship in a live documentary experience directed by friend, collaborator, and their former grandfather, Spike Jonze.

recommendations.title: Star Trek VI: The Undiscovered Country
recommendations.overview: After years of war, the Federation and the Klingon empire find themselves on the brink of a peace summit when a Klingon ship is nearly destroyed by an apparent attack from the Enterprise. Both worlds brace for what may be their deadliest encounter.

recommendations.title: The Captains
recommendations.overview: The Captains is a feature-length documentary film written and directed by William Shatner. The film follows Shatner as he interviews the other actors who have portrayed starship captains in the Star Trek franchise.

recommendations.title: I Am Heath Ledger
recommendations.overview: The life and career of an actor, artist, and icon. His own journey through his own camera.

recommendations.title: Time After Time
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Drama, Comedy, Science Fiction, Thriller
recommendations.overview: Writer H. G. Wells pursues Jack the Ripper to modern day San Francisco after the infamous serial killer steals his time machine to escape the 19th century.

recommendations.title: Volunteers
recommendations.overview: After graduating from Yale in 1962, womanizing Lawrence flees a gambling debt that his rich dad won't pay and takes his roomie's place as a Peace Corps Volunteer in the Thai Golden Triangle with two other PCVs. Will he survive two years?

recommendations.title: Pride and Prejudice
recommendations.overview: In early 19th century England, Mr and Mrs Bennet's five unmarried daughters vie for the affections of rich and eligible Mr Bingley and his status-conscious friend, Mr Darcy, who have moved into their neighbourhood. While Bingley takes an immediate li

recommendations.title: Pumping Iron
recommendations.overview: Amateur and professional bodybuilders prepare for the 1975 Mr. Olympia and Mr. Universe contests as five-time champion Arnold Schwarzenegger defends his Mr. Olympia title against Serge Nubret and the shy young Lou Ferrigno.
